name: Anadama Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cornmeal into a bowl.
2. Carefully pour boiling water into the cornmeal, stirring to ensure it is smooth.
3. Allow mixture to cool for about 30 minutes.
4. Stir in molasses, salt, and butter.
5. Add yeast to the pan, then sprinkle bread flour over the top.
6. Pour the cornmeal mixture into the pan with yeast and flour.
7. Select white bread setting on your bread maker and start the machine.
